programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report on the death of colorful entrepreneur and Las Vegas gambler Gary Triano, who was blown up in his car after finishing a round of golf at the exclusive La Paloma Country Club in Tucson, Arizona in 1996.

programme.title: Tell Me That You Love Me, Junie Moon
programme.desc: The story of three wildly neurotic characters: A facially disfigured girl, a homosexual paraplegic and an introvert epileptic who, after leaving the hospital, set up housekeeping together in a cottage where they support each other.

programme.title: On a Clear Day You Can See Forever
programme.desc: Daisy Gamble, a woman who hears phones before they ring wants to quit smoking, to please her fiancee, Warren. She goes to a doctor of hypnosis to do it. But once she's under, her doctor finds out that she can regress into past lives.

programme.title: Lifeguard

programme.title: Voyage Of The Damned
programme.desc: The tragic 1939 voyage of SS St. Louis carrying hundreds of German Jewish refugees from Nazi Germany that seemingly no nation is willing to save from certain doom.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham One Two Three (1974)
programme.desc: A gang hijacks a subway train and threaten to kill the hostages one by one until their demands are met. Forced to stall, transit chief Lt. Garber (Walter Matthau) must outmaneuver one of the craftiest and cruelest screen villains (Robert Shaw) ever.

programme.title: The Great Train Robbery

programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage…and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: First Blood

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II

programme.title: Rambo III

programme.title: Platoon

programme.desc: Eugene's Birthday: Arnold is the cause of two birthday party's for Eugene being a big flop. Stinky's Pumpkin: Stinky feels that he is a failure at everything he does until Arnold helps him discover that he is the best pumpkin grower in town.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cat poses as an ace surfer to woo a pretty Surfer Girl, who promises to be his queen if he can surf the "big" wave. To Cat's dismay, Dog follows his instincts and chases a dragonfly all over the house.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Fed up with each other, Cat and Dog dream that they are separate creatures, never having met. A truckload of sheep crashes near the CatDog house, and Dog artfully herds the flock back into formation.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: To save money on electric bills, Cat hooks the hyperkinetic Dog up to a treadmill in order to create his own juice. Cat meticulously cleans the house in preparation for a visit from Sally.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Rancid Rabbit comes to CatDog and says that he is going to tear down the CatDog house in order to build a freeway. CatDog are the favorite to win the Forest Fire Boy Of the Year Award, but first they must win their camping badge.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: CatDog find themselves in the dog pound because the Dog urinated on the dogcatcher's leg. CatDog try to find a soul-mate for Winslow because they think, if he's in love, he'll stop tormenting them.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: It's Jolly Olde England and Rancid Rabbit is king. Meanwhile, CatDog are living the life of lowly garbage pickers. Cat and Dog both fall in love with Loraine Dejardin, who likes opera and playing fetch.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Dunglap hires Dog to eat his homework so he can truthfully use the excuse, “My Dog Ate My Homework.” While looking through Winslow's telescope, CatDog become convinced that a big, black cloud is foretelling the rain to end all rains.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: CatDog take over a paper route after Dog chases the paper boy, again, and he quits. CatDog meet DanStan, ostensibly another CatDog. Cat is elated but Dog senses there is something wrong about those two.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: CatDog find out that Cliff is taking ballet lessons. Randolph recruits CatDog for his “Freak-A-Palooza” circus.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: When a bratty preschooler tells Santa she wants CatDog for Christmas, Cat convinces Dog to accept so they can live in opulent splendor — which causes Santa to cancel Christmas!

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: CatDog get a job as the Firedog at the Nearburg firehouse. Dog enters the Nearburg Dog Show, and dresses as a woolly Afghan with a hairy butt (Cat).

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug was looking forward to Beebe's party, until something shows up that makes it impossible for him to go out in public. Phil Funnie convinces Doug that he has a great idea for a kite to compete in the upcoming Bluffscout airshow.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug is paired with the weird twins Al and Moo Sleech for the class project of "Get to Know your Fellow Student." Judy is getting her license, and Doug tells Patti that she'll take them to the amusement park.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Mrs. Wingo has a substitute and Doug somehow makes a bad first impression. Patti's pulverizers are winning games but all of the parents, including Doug's dad, want their kid to pitch.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Assistant Principle Bone shuts down the school newspaper because of Doug's unflattering cartoon of the school's least favorite lunch food, magic meat. Doug and Skeeter are having trouble finding a scary monster for their movie.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Some tough highschoolers offer to sell Doug the rarest Man-O-Steel Man comic book, the only issue he is missing. Doug is convinvced that Skeeter's new girlfriend, Loretta, is a liar, and Skeeter is blindly being taken for a ride.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug wants to raise enough money to buy a new skateboard and sets up a lawnmowing enterprise to do so. Everyone is talking about the final scene in the latest horror flick. But Doug closed his eyes and missed the ending.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug unwittingly volunteers to take get-well cards to Mr. Bone who is in the hospital. But Mr. Bone thinks he's getting Doug's prized skateboard. Dink volunteers Doug to dress up as the Big Honkerburger for a week.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug and Skeeter accidentally toss Patti's new frisbee into a fenced-in yard. Going in after it, Doug has a near-death experience with a guard-dog. Beebe gets Doug and Skeeter their first gig for their new band, but they have to let her join.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: Doug is accused of helping the Moody School kids steal a piece of the Bluffington School float for the upcoming parade. Doug tries to impress Patti with a magic trick, but it backfires and they become handcuffed together.

programme.title: Doug
programme.desc: A letter from Doug's school arrives addressed to his parents. It's the day of the big football game against Bloatsburg and Doug is snared by Coach Spitz who mistakenly believes Doug possesses a "golden toe" for kicking.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: After a chilling vampire movie, Sid is so spooked that he believes that Stinky has all of the characteristics of a vampire. Olga comes home and wants to be a big sister to a little girl.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Gerald becomes addicted to a game called "The King." When Arnold notices that Gerald is avoiding him and making excuses regarding his whereabouts, he becomes suspicious. Arnold, Sid, Gerald, and Harold go on a fishing trip.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: The guys find a bag of money and they want to split it up right away. But Arnold strongly suggests the honest route "to turn the money into the police and keep it if no one claims it."

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: When a new bully comes on the block, Wolfgang feels threatened that he will lose his power over Arnold and the gang. Phoebe breaks her leg when she rescues Helga from the pathway of a speeding bus.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold tries to help Eugene get out of a tree but gets stuck himself. After a busy day at school of boasting and fashion policing, Rhonda comes home and finds out that they are now broke and have nothing left.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Helga loses her infamous locket and it winds up in the wrong place in Arnold's house. Sid learns that germs are on just about everything people touch and becomes so psychotic about hygiene that he wears a protective suit.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: During a game of baseball, Arnold pops a fly ball and it hits Helga in the head. The knock on the head makes her goofy and causes amnesia. Grandpa is paid a visit by his old friend Jimmy, which sparks up his competitive nature.

programme.title: Drake and Josh
programme.desc: Drake has taken advantage of Josh for the last time and Josh decides that he is done dealing with Drake.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: When Ferguson displays her training bra in show-and-tell, Clarissa hatches a plan to send Ferg-face into outer space via helium balloons and a straight jacket.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: Clarissa is determined not to wear the same old blue cardigan and knee socks for her school picture, and devises a scheme to outfit herself in the coolest clothes around.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: In an attempt to get around her moms no TV rule in the Darling home for a week, Clarissa connects her computer to the cable converter and nearly blows up the house.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: Although she's too young for a driver's license, Clarissa is consumed by the desire to acquire a 1976 Gremlin she finds in the want-ads.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel
programme.desc: Nickelodeon's first spin-off series, Kenan & Kel, is a buddy comedy starring Kenan Thompson and Kel Mitchell from All That. These two friends dauntlessly chase after things most teenagers dream about, but few dare to pursue.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel
programme.desc: Kenan and Kel are preparing to spend a Saturday at home watching the Bulls game on TV. When Kenan takes a bite of a tuna sandwich, he begins to choke. Kel realizes Kenan is in danger and uses the Heimlich maneuver and out pops a screw!

programme.title: Kenan & Kel
programme.desc: Kenan decides that to live life to the fullest, he must be like Ernest Hemingway and set a list of goals for himself to accomplish. At the top of Kenan's list is Brianna -- the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel
programme.desc: A typical evening at the Rockmores: Kel & the family sit around playing a board game. Kel suddenly becomes the center of attention as he tells the family things he could not possibly have had prior knowledge of.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel
programme.desc: When two hip older teenagers scoff at Kenan and Kel for being too young to get into a real club, the boys set about making their dance club -- in Rigby's.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel
programme.desc: Kenan finally gets up the nerve to ask out Brianna, the girl of his dreams. On the night of their date, she arrives wearing a beautiful white sweater her grandmother knitted for her before she died.

programme.title: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Susie is discovered as a great singing talent by an agent who leads her to believe she's going to be the next teen superstar.

programme.title: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Lil strikes a blow for independence from a bewildered Phil. Chuckie takes a defiant stand against the mandatory President's Fitness Test.

programme.title: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Chuckie adopts an alter ego in order to gain the attention of a popular girl who doesn't even know he exists. Angelica, needing a juicy expose to insure her 'ace' reporter status, takes on Pepe, the eccentric cafeteria chef and his unconventional cuisine.

programme.title: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Kimi befriends Z, the proverbial bad boy. Chuckie's alarms go off and he is determined to prove to his sister this kid is up to no good. Meanwhile, Angelica is unable to do her online Ask Angelica advice chat and uses Harold to sit in.

programme.title: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Tommy enters a filmmaking contest. Attempting Cinema Verite, he ends up filming the 'rats in less than flattering situations. When they furiously confront him, he must choose between friendship and his art.

programme.title: All Grown Up
programme.desc: The 'rats are feeling the pressure of the looming school standardized tests. At the same time there is a rash of bizarre thefts in the Pickles' neighborhood. All clues point to Dil.

programme.title: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Sick of Phil's overuse of video games, Betty decides to take him, Tommy, and Chuckie on a rafting adventure, with Chas in tow as a helping hand.

programme.title: Zoey 101

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank recibe una orden de la alcaldesa para asistir a un desfile en honor a un hombre que estuvo en prisión por conspirar en un ataque contra la policía.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el caso de un detective que fue asesinado antes de testificar contra un criminal de carrera.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una madre soltera cuyo exesposo tiene un historial de violencia.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Un niño llamado Ángel aparece en medio del desierto con profundas cargas psicológicas al haber sido capturado por un psicópata. El niño no puede articular palabras, pero él es el único que puede dar una pista para salvar a otro niño desaparecido.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer en Oregon es encontrada muerta en un asilo, la UAC se da cuenta que la víctima es parte de una serie de asesinatos rituales góticos y que el asesino podría ser satanista.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La hermana de Morgan ve a una muchacha que se parece a su prima supuestamente muerta. Morgan tiene que confesar a su familia la mentira que él dijo, y el UAC vuelve a abrir el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de un asesino en serie es ejecutado en Oklahoma, un imitador aparece y los agentes del FBI son llamados para encontrarlo. Al mismo tiempo, Prentiss se pone nerviosa pensando en una importante compra inmobiliaria.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Luego de que Torres y Bishop sean víctimas de un atropello y fuga, Torres lucha por su vida en la UCI.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El principal sospechoso en una investigación de asesinato del NCIS es una amiga de Gibbs, Phillip Brooks (Don Lake), que conoció en un sitio de citas. Además, Sloane tiene un admirador secreto en el Día de San Valentín.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el suicidio de un oficial de la Marina retirado, que dejó una moneda rara y valiosa en el Museo Nacional de la Marina. El equipo se imagina a sí mismo en la historia de su vida para reconstruir cómo la moneda quedó en su poder.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga la muerte de un oficial de la Marina asesinado de la misma manera que sus padres hace una década, se topan con un contenedor de almacenamiento lleno de casas de muñecas que muestran recreaciones de escenas de asesinatos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una madre soltera cuyo exesposo tiene un historial de violencia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando un famoso jugador de baloncesto aparece muerto por una aparente sobredosis, Danny investiga sus posibles vínculos con una banda local de drogas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El caso se vuelve personal para Danny cuando trabaja para proteger a la enfermera Faith Madson (Jessie Mueller) de su violento exnovio.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When a driver fails to stop, a freeway pursuit ensues. Officers investigate a suspicious car parked in a commercial parking lot. Officers respond to a shoplifting call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets busted during a drug deal, a cyclist gets confused when an officer finds narcotics in his pants, and officers respond to reports of gunfire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies. Police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van. A confused man loses track of what’s in his pockets.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An eldery woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An ATV driver leads deputies on a wild chase, a woman tries to ditch a bag of hard drugs, and an assault suspect is caught off guard by an incriminating voicemail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The K-9 unit tracks down a man fleeing on foot, a father is left with no choice but to call the cops on his son, and a former gang member is found with a stolen firearm.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies search a suspicious vehicle behind a strip club. A man threatens to shoot employees at a car rental company. A man tosses lip balm filled with narcotics out the window during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman bites both the arresting officer and a store manager after getting caught stealing beer. The passenger of a suspicious vehicle is caught attempting to hide drugs in the seat. Police respond to a domestic abuse call involving a knife and two women.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A narcotics sting in Alabama yields arrests, officers chase a drunk driver to his front yard, and a woman who called the police for help does not make a good case for herself.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest draws a crowd, a homeless man decides to camp out in someone's house while they're in the hospital and a traffic stop results in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman tells officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is arrested after officers find a loaded gun during a routine search. Two men are detained after suspected of battery. During Mardi Gras officers arrest a man pickpocketing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit switches gears when the driver flees on foot, an altercation causes tension between neighbors, and a driver is irate when officers search his passenger.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A little rain doesn’t stop a determined quad driver from trying to outrun police. A deputy has doubts about a man’s professed distrust of banks. A man ignores obvious red flags when buying a moped and ends up paying the price.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to bargain with officers from a rooftop, a nightclub manager confronts the employee who stole his cash, and a talkative man insists he meant to get arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers smell the pungent odor of marijuana during a minor traffic violation. Cocaine is found on a suspect pulled over for a broken windshield. A store is robbed by someone in a red dress.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Zoolander 2

programme.title: Lo que ellas quieren
programme.desc: Nick Marshall (Mel Gibson), un ejecutivo publicitario y soltero promiscuo, obtiene accidentalmente el poder de oír lo que piensan las mujeres. Nick decide usar su nuevo poder para sabotear a su jefa, Darcy (Helen Hunt), y avanzar en su propia carrera.

programme.title: Tómalo con calma
programme.desc: John Travolta regresa como Chili Palmer en esta película, así que "Tómalo con calma". Con un reparto lleno de estrellas como Uma Thurman y The Rock, esta película cuenta la cómica historia de un mafioso que quiere ser un gigante de la música.

programme.title: La mujer de mis pesadillas
programme.desc: Ben Stiller personifica a Eddie, el soltero empedernido de 40 años que finalmente da el "sí" a la hermosa Lila. Pero durante la luna de miel, la mujer de sus sueños resulta ser una completa pesadilla.

programme.title: Como un jefe
programme.desc: Las mejores amigas Mia y Mel dirigen su propia marca de cosméticos hasta que una poderosa magnate de la belleza trama arrebatársela, poniendo su amistad en peligro.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: Guerra de papás
programme.desc: ¡Will Ferrell y Mark Wahlberg frente a frente en este enfrentamiento entre papá y padrastro! Brad (Ferrell) quiere ser el mejor padrastro para los hijos de su nueva esposa.

programme.title: El crimen del padre Amaro
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: El Inca (LAS)
programme.desc: Una trágica historia de amor basada en la vida del dos veces campeón mundial de boxeo venezolano Edwin "el Inca" Valero.

programme.title: Complices
programme.desc: Un seductor experto lleva a su sobrino en un viaje a la playa en busca de mujeres calientes. Pero la única mujer capaz de causarle problemas, aparece allí.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Mama para rato
programme.desc: En el Día Sagrado de las Muertes, una madre regresa y descubre que sus tres hijos son desconsiderados, feos y vagos.

programme.title: Ladron Que Roba a Ladron (LAS)
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones profesionales hallan complicado su plan para robar a un millonario después de que los miembros hábiles del equipo regular rechazan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: La maldición
programme.desc: En este thriller apasionante y sobrenatural con las estrellas más populares de Hollywood, un temor del estudio crece hasta convertirse en una vertiginosa pesadilla para un profesor y tres sujetos atrapados en una mansión misteriosa.

programme.title: 666: El niño Diablo
programme.desc: Un avión de pasajeros se precipita desde el cielo hasta la Tierra. De las brasas ardientes se levanta un sobreviviente solitario: un niño pequeño. La pareja sin hijos que lo adopte pronto descubrirá que no es un niño indefenso sino algo muy poderoso.

programme.title: Pandemia lupina
programme.desc: Un joven fotógrafo de vida silvestre arriba al aeropuerto JFK infectado con una enfermedad extraña. Haciendo fila en la aduana, de repente se convierte en un hombre lobo. Las víctimas a las que muerde no mueren, sino que también se transforman.

programme.title: Squealer
programme.desc: Tyrese Gibson protagoniza una historia aterradora basada en hechos reales. A medida que crece la lista de personas desaparecidas en una pequeña ciudad, los actos de un asesino en serie se descubren en una granja de cerdos local.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: Cuando su amigo hacker accidentalmente canaliza una misteriosa señal inalámbrica, un grupo de estudiantes se reúnen para detener a un terrible mal que se apodera del mundo.

programme.title: Solomon Kane (ESP)
programme.desc: El capitán Solomon Kane (James Purefoy) es una máquina de matar brutalmente eficiente del siglo XVI.

programme.title: EL Ojo (2008)
programme.desc: Una chica ciega recibe un trasplante de córnea para poder recuperar la vista. Sin embargo, recibe más de lo que esperaba cuando se da cuenta de que puede ver inquietantes fantasmas.

programme.title: Venganza diabólica
programme.desc: Un hombre conjura a un demonio aterrador llamado Pumpkinhead para llevar a cabo su venganza en contra de los adolescentes, quienes sin querer, mataron a su hijo.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Mule Train
programme.desc: When natural cement is discovered by two prospectors, one is murdered during a claim jump attempt. Marshal Gene Autry befriends the lone prospector and tries to help him promote his cement discovery.

programme.title: The Blazing Sun
programme.desc: Gene Autry and pal Mike hunt bank robbers Al Bartlett and Trot Lucas. To throw off his pursuers, Bartlett kills his own twin brother and Lucas hoping that Gene and the Sheriff will believe him dead.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: In the New World, a new Spanish governor finds the province of Nueva Aragón under the iron fist of the corrupt Colonel Huerta and vows to bring justice under the guise of a masked avenger.

programme.title: The Hills Run Red
programme.desc: A man recently released from a five-year prison sentence seeks vengeance against the former friend who has violated his trust and sought his death. Starring Thomas Hunter, Henry Silva, and Dan Duryea.

programme.title: Sam Whiskey
programme.desc: Welcome to America's Wild - and very wacky - West! Burt Reynolds, Clint Walker, Ossie Davis and Angie Dickinson star in this tongue-in-cheek tale of love, lust and larceny as an amiable con-artist is hire by a sexy widow to break into the U.S. Mint.

programme.title: The Way West
programme.desc: Icons Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum and Richard Widmark star in this sumptuous, epic tale of the brave men and women in the U.S. who left the comfort and safety of life in the East for the promise of free land a better life in the untamed West.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: A cave collapse traps a man, and all eyes turn toward the tragedy, including those of Charles "Chuck" Tatum (Kirk Douglas), a washed-up newspaper reporter who sees the incident as a ticket back to his former days at the top of the journalism heap.

programme.title: Artists and Models
programme.desc: A goonish young man receives telepathic top secret information in his nightmares, which are used by his artist friend in comic strips. Foreign agents and the CIA get interested.

programme.title: Visit To A Small Planet
programme.desc: Curious about humans, Lewis parks his spaceship in the backyard of a skeptic, and both get a glimpse of a world they'll never forget! Based on the play by Gore Vidal.

programme.title: Beach Party
programme.desc: It's the film that launched a genre and an iconic screen pairing as Frankie Avalon and Annette Funicello team for the first time for sand, surf and fun as an anthropologist (Robert Cummings) studies the wild dating habits of Malibu teenagers!

programme.title: Muscle Beach Party
programme.desc: Frankie Avalon and Annette Funicello and the gang are back together in the 2nd of American International's Beach Party films and this time the beach is overrun by muscle men and their obnoxious trainer.

programme.title: Bikini Beach
programme.desc: There are big waves crashing at Bikini Beach! The beach is close to becoming a retirement village. And a British pop star comes between Dee Dee (Annette Funicello) and Frankie (Frankie Avalon). Will it all be resolved by the end of summer vacation?

programme.title: Beach Blanket Bingo
programme.desc: When a publicity stunt to promote the singing career of Sugar Kane (Linda Evans) balloons out of control, Frankie (Frankie Avalon), Dee Dee (Annette Funicello) and the gang are pulled into the ensuing comic adventures.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is all excited when an old friend whom he used to work with, Joe Tucker, stops by for a visit. Archie soon discovers that Joe, who has been unemployed for quite some time, is trying to get a job at Archie's plant.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria befriends the box boy, George, who works at the local supermarket and happens to be mentally handicapped. When Archie discovers this, all of his misconceptions come pouring out and he encourages Gloria not to lead him on.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: La mejora digital del video de la cámara de seguridad muestra que lo que parece ser un encuentro casual es en realidad un secuestro forzado, que conduce al asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Ahogamiento seco
programme.desc: Cuando Genell Plude es encontrada muerta en su baño, la escena apunta a un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La hija de Paul Gruber sospechaba que algo malo estaba ocurriendo cuando recibió unas tarjetas de regalo enviadas de parte de su padre, pero escritas con la letra de una persona extraña.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sin oraciones
programme.desc: La fundadora de American Atheists desapareció en 1995 junto con uno de sus hijos y su nieta, junto con 500,000 dólares en monedas de oro. La policía se centró en varios sospechosos, incluyendo a David R. Waters, que trabajaba para los Ateos Americanos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trampa para turistas
programme.desc: En 1993, el estado de Florida era conocido por algo más que Disney World. La atención mundial se centró en una serie de robos dirigidos a turistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, de 35 años, fue condenada por el asesinato de David Nixon en Abril del 2002 después de que él había planeado terminar su relación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Leann Fletcher, los investigadores usan análisis de salpicaduras de sangre y computación forense para encontrar el motivo de su asesinato: su esposo, estaba teniendo una aventura con la jueza Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intrusión bienvenida
programme.desc: Un hombre le dice a la policía que le disparó a un intruso que había atacado y asesinado a su esposa. El marido pinta un cuadro trágico y es apodado héroe.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el verano de 1986, el cuerpo de Kathleen Lipscomb fue encontrado en una carretera desierta en las afueras de San Antonio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un violador en serie anda suelto en una ciudad de Texas. Nadie sabía dónde atacaría a continuación, pero la audacia de sus ataques y la escalada de violencia contra sus víctimas hicieron que encontrarlo fuera imperativo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, cuando Steven Fortin ataca a la Oficial de Policía Estatal de Maine fuera de su hora servicio, Vicky Gardner, durante una parada rutinaria, se desencadena una serie de eventos que reinician de golpe un caso de asesinato estancado en New Jersey.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un saco de dormir desechado, que contiene zapatillas de deporte ensangrentadas y un bolso, lleva a la policía al cuerpo de una mujer joven.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, los bomberos de California habían combatido diez incendios provocados en tres semanas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El infiel
programme.desc: Walter Notheis, Jr. era mejor conocido al público Americano como el entretenedor, Walter Scott, vocalista principal de la banda, Bob Kuban and the In-Men. Walter no sabía que la canción sería una premonición de los eventos que llevarían a su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una peluquera joven y atractiva fue agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su propio salón de belleza. La evidencia en la escena del crimen no coincidió con ninguno de los sospechosos y, después de la investigación inicial, el caso se archivó por diez años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Voto de silencio
programme.desc: Una mirada al caso contra Jack Reeves. Unos amigos informaron que su novia por correo había desaparecido. La policía centró sus sospechas en Reeves y, mientras buscaba pistas, descubrió información que lo vinculaba con la muerte de dos ex esposas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, se descubrieron un cráneo humano y algunos huesos en un campamento de niños exploradores cerca de Farmington, Missouri. La reconstrucción facial ayuda a los investigadores en este caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, cuando un grupo fundamentalista comienza a robar bancos cerca de Spokane, las autoridades saben de inmediato que están tratando con criminales con experiencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: DCC hopefuls try on the iconic uniform for cameos, show off their hip-hop skills for celebrity choreographer Marty Kudelka and learn table manners in an etiquette class.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the first football game approaches, Kelli and Judy watch tape on AT&T Stadium's famously large HD screens to see who is game day-ready -- and figure out the final cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make the emotional final cuts, dreams come true when the 2018 DCC squad is announced, and the women hit the field for their first game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of hopefuls arrive at AT&T Stadium to start the rigorous audition process for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders, competing for the fewest number of open spots ever.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 101 remaining hopefuls must master tough choreography, learn the famous DCC kick line and impress judges Melissa Rycroft and Charm La'Donna.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A hunting safari in Zambia's Kafue National Park ends in a nightmare when a shot rings out from the cabin of dentist Dr. Larry Rudolph and his wife Bianca.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers investigate a string of deadly shootings targeting women in the border city of Laredo, Texas.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A detective comes face to face with a serial killer when she promises to get justice for the mother of a victim whose body turns up at an Anaheim trash facility.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Using DNA testing and a photographer's diary, a retired detective reopens a cold case involving the death of a beautiful young mother.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Suspicions arise when a man's wife dies in a house fire and then a second tragedy claims his son's life.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: As Hurricane Charley ravages a small town in Florida, a man trying to avoid his past hides out in a hotel room.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When Cara Ryan shoots her ex-husband and accuses him of threatening to kill her, police question her motive.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: New insights into the real story of the very private royal, including a look at Diana's troubled marriage, her turbulent life in the royal family and the investigation into her death.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A DNA breakthrough in a murder case that is more than a decade old leads two determined detectives to surprising suspects.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Detectives look into a couple's complicated past when a man finds his wife stabbed to death in their home.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: In Flav We Trust
programme.desc: Flavor Flav has put his heart on the line three times only to have it handed back to him. But he is willing to give it one final go – swearing he'll find true love or die trying!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Pimp My Gurney
programme.desc: Waking up with 15 girls, Flav quickly presents their first challenge. Flav's looking for a girl that can mend his broken heart.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Flav asks the remaining 13 girls to create a theme restaurant for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Things That Go Bump On The Lip
programme.desc: Flav splits his ladies up into two teams for the first ever Flavorette Roast Challenge. Each team picks one girl from the other team to put in the hot seat, and they cut loose with a full on verbal beatdown.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Lyin The Witch And The Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for someone who can be a mother as well as a mate, so he has the girls create a bedtime story for a group of children.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Dial M For Mystery Pimp Caller?
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for a woman with the “Total Package.” And now, with only eight women left in his house, he has devised the “Total Package Challenge” to judge who offers the most.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Halitosis Ohmyosis
programme.desc: Flav challenges the final six girls to a calendar shoot showing off the bodies of the year.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: A Night At The Hip Hopera
programme.desc: With the latest twist still fresh and furious on the Flavorettes' minds, two new alliances quickly form in the house.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Flav is so smitten with the remaining nine girls that he's going to marry them!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Neverwed Game
programme.desc: The remaining seven girls are in for a big surprise when they find themselves on the set of the first ever “Neverwed Game” starring Arsenio Hall as the host and their own ex-boyfriends!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: When Flavorettes Attack
programme.desc: Flav bring his five remaining girls to "Big Boy's Neighborhood" on LA's biggest Hip Hop Radio Station to have live callers help him decide which girl is right for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Its A Family Flav Fair
programme.desc: With only four women left vying for Flav's affection the moment of truth has arrived, meeting the parents.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Von Boyage
programme.desc: After the last elimination, Flav tells his final three girls to pack their bags because they are heading to Cannes, France!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Clip Show
programme.desc: Episode 14 is a clip show with never before seen footage.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby is tired of being an invisible computer geek so he decides to join a sports team. Girls love wrestlers - that includes Toby’s crush Kendra. To Toby's dismay, the few extra pounds he carries put him in the same weight class as athletic Sean.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s crush on Craig has reached huge proportions and everyone’s urging her to ask him out already! But Manny’s a romantic; she thinks the guy ought to do the asking

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Grade Nine International Day is coming up and Hazel isn’t thrilled. After all, Hazel’s Jamaican and everybody loves the islands - right? When the day arrives, Hazel’s display is a hit, but she isn’t acting like herself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie are the best of friends. But Ellie is starting to want more…Marco though can’t seem to respond in kind. He’s more and more confused about what and who he’s looking for…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When class clown JT acts up in Science class, his teacher Ms. Hatzilakos gives him a serious detention - assisting her with the guinea pigs all week. JT’s annoyed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Sean. He and Emma are back together. He’s a star on the basketball team. And he and Jimmy have buried the hatchet. Jimmy’s even invited him to a party. But the good feelings don’t last for long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Liberty can’t believe it when she doesn’t make the Girls Floor Hockey team – she’s never failed at anything. So when Coach Hatzilakos asks her to be the Team Manager, Liberty throws all her energy into managing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy are back together, but it doesn’t feel quite the same. Ash may not look the same as last year – she’s a Goth now – but Jimmy’s sure she’s still the same golden girl inside.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s mom is away for a few days and it’s just her and her step-dad, Mr. Simpson. He’s supportive of Emma’s involvement in “Food for Thought”; the student group who wants to remove genetically modified (GM) foods from the school cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: A stickler for perfection, Kathleen is demonstrating symptoms of anorexia, even as she devotes her energies to winning first place in the Science Fair.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When Melanie can’t come up with the twenty dollars she needs to buy a concert ticket, she borrows it from her mother's purse. Shane tells Spike he can't pay for child support so that he can buy a ticket instead, and Joey makes a twenty-dollar bet.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Still trying to come to terms with his adoptive parents' death, Wheels runs away to be with his biological father, who has sent him a postcard. When he arrives, however, he receives a cool welcome.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Still trying to come to terms with his adoptive parents' death, Wheels runs away to be with his biological father, who has sent him a postcard. When he arrives, however, he receives a cool welcome.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Arthur feels rejected when his father continues to see more and more of a new girlfriend.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: B.L.T. fights with an upperclassman who makes a racist comment. Later, when he asks Michelle to the dance, her parents forbid her to go with him because he is black.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When Alexa's parents won't let her have a party, Lucy offers to host one instead, since her parents are going away.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: The third term at Degrassi Junior High ends with a bang. Wheels passes algebra, but Spike is not so lucky.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being in counseling for a long time, Paige is positive she’s recovered from her date rape. In fact, she’s convinced her life is back to normal – Dean and what he did are behind her forever. She never wants to see him again, so she’s dismissive.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s exam time and everyone’s stressed – especially Craig. In a surprise visit from his father, Craig learns that his dad is very eager to have him back in his life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Although his father is gone, Craig wants to get on with his life as normal. He insists on going back to school immediately and becomes frustrated with his friends when they behave with concern.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s on a mission this year—it’s bye bye cute and hello hot. That means midriff baring tops, low-riders and thongs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner just can’t deal with the fact that Marco’s gay so he tries to cut Marco out of life. But when the guys all go to see Dylan’s hockey game, Jimmy makes sure that Marco comes along.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: How did Stone Age people reach North and South America? Dr Alice Roberts discovers evidence for an ancient corridor through the Canadian ice sheet that may have allowed those first people through.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how earthquakes and faults have shaped human history by bringing both life and death.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how rocks have influenced the architecture of the Mediterranean, from the pyramids of Egypt to the squares of ancient Greece.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Tracing the history of cave paintings.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart examines how the rocks beneath our feet played a crucial role in determining the beliefs of ancient civilisations.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how ancient civilisations learned to exploit the water around them, from the flooding of our Stone Age ancestors' hunting grounds to the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how salt has played a crucial role in the history of the Mediterranean, from the ice ages to the preservation of food and dead bodies in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: The Mystery of Rome's X Tomb
programme.desc: Dr Michael Scott investigates the secrets of a tomb containing over 2,000 bodies in one of the catacombs of Rome.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough shows us how ancient creatures have come to be preserved as fossils and how those fossils can shed light on characteristics of these creatures' lives, and even their death.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in, it's a tough job, but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa's wedding is only three days away, but Dog is thinking about bounties, not bouquets. A hot bounty comes in and Dog wants to go on the hunt. When the ladies object, Dog explains his decision, "We're a family of hunters, we need to hunt."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close-knit community.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam, and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address, they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them that it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog believes in safety first, and today's hunt puts this philosophy to the test. The fugitive's problem with anger management increases the dangers of their already risky line of work. Dog warns the crew to be ready for anything as they head out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived, the only question is whom?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen, you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known" addresses.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island, she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.desc: Blake mortgages the mansion to raise money; Tracy tells Alexis of her affair with Dex; Alexis is questioned about Mark's death; Sammy Jo intends to obtain custody of her son; an unknown woman, full of curiosity about Alexis, checks into La Mirage.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the early hours of a morning just before Christmas, a college student was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment. Her body was found later that day; she had been sexually assaulted and shot at point-blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, 22-year-old Dawn Bruce is brutally murdered in her Virginia apartment. Investigators notice a blood smear on a pillow case that appears to have been made by one of the killer's fingers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon goes missing, it appears to be foul play. In his will, he leaves instructions in case he should die under violent circumstances — which were carried out after a hiker comes across his bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, the body of Colorado real estate developer Alan Helmick was found by his wife, Miriam, who then became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: At the scene of a vicious murder, the killer went to a great deal of effort to wipe away his fingerprints and obscure his shoe impressions left when he tracked blood trails on the floor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police suspect a man who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood are found in the interior. Finally, a tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helps solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue — a flaw on a mailing envelope — exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman had been sexually assaulted, stabbed repeatedly and left for dead. When a perfect suspect practically turned himself in, police were sure they had their man — until DNA evidence proved them wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky impresses Lucy and the Mertzes with all the answers to a radio quiz show they are enjoying. He doesn't let on that the reason he knows the answers is that he was present at the taping. Lucy is so impressed that she signs him up as a contestant.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky tries to get a raise from his boss Mr. Littlefield but he is denied. Littlefield hires another act for the Tropicana and Lucy, Ethel and Fred decide to make sure no one shows up for the opening.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Upset at Lucy's irresponsible spending, Ricky suggests she could change her ways if she had a job. Lucy and Ethel propose switching roles with their husbands for a week; they will get jobs if the men stay home to do all the housework.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky and his band are going on a tour and Lucy wants to go too. She dusts off her old saxophone and goes down to the club dressed in a zoot suit to audition for a spot.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' eleventh wedding anniversary is coming up and Ricky doesn't seem to be picking up the none-too-subtle hints Lucy is giving. She doesn't realize that Ricky has already made plans to buy a string of pearls at a discount from their neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After seeing Fred use a pair of trick handcuffs, Lucy uses a similar pair to attach herself to Ricky as gag. She wants him to stay at home and not go to a rehearsal for a live TV show the next day.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel's club must put on an operetta to commemorate its 25th anniversary. However, Lucy, the club treasurer, admits to Ethel that for the past couple of years, she has been mismanaging both the club's budget and her own household budget.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes and Ricardos feel that their marriages are in a rut and they decide to follow the advice of a book and take a brief vacation from each other. The women move in together as do the guys but they soon all find that they miss each other.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: For the Mertzes' twenty-fifth wedding anniversary, Lucy and Ricky present them with a television set. As they are watching it, Ricky's constant adjustments cause the set to explode. Fred gets even by kicking in the Ricardos' TV set.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel enter a contest for new home furnishings. If they are the lucky winner, they must be home the next day to receive a phone call. Unfortunately Ricky has four tickets to a new musical which he really wants to see.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tropicana club is about to re-open under new management and is looking to Ricky to put on the best possible show. The only problem is that Ricky has come down with a terrible case of laryngitis, and is unable to talk, much less sing.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Not feeling well, Lucy takes herself to the doctor and receives the happy news that she is pregnant. Ethel and Fred find out before Ricky and eagerly begin dreaming about being the lucky godparents. Getting the news to Ricky is not as easy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A doting husband and father-to-be, Ricky makes the mistake of giving more attention to the arriving baby than he does to his fickle wife. Ricky tries to please Lucy by making her waffles and he doubles his efforts by giving Lucy baby gifts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is holding auditions for a new revue he's putting on at the Tropicana. Ricky tells Fred and Ethel that they should audition, but a pregnant Lucy wants part of the spotlight as well. Ricky doesn't go for the idea, so Lucy sneaks into an audition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Wanting to provide the best environment possible for her child, Lucy decides that she and Ricky should learn to speak proper English. Lucy makes a deal with a tutor who will teach English to the Ricardos.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After members of her club throw her a baby shower, Lucy realizes that Ricky has become jealous of the attention she and the baby are receiving. She consults with a doctor when Ricky complains about nausea, dizziness, and stomach ache.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: With her baby due any moment, Lucy finds it challenging trying to remain calm given Ricky's nervous behavior. When she asks the Mertzes to come over to offset Ricky, she winds up with three very anxious people.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy gets caught up in a tormenting cycle of buying a useless appliance from a fast-talking salesman, then trading it in for something more expensive when trying to return it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Could it be? Is Lucy Ricardo not funny? When Lucy's jokes fail to crack a smile amongst her friends and husband, she begins to develop an inferiority complex. Her depression gets worse when she discovers she's no good at bridge.

programme.desc: Entre las guerras de cocaína en Miami a principios de 1980, tres cadáveres llevaron a un escuadrón táctico formado por varias agencias a sospechar que un grupo de policías podía estar involucrado en redadas ilegales por drogas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A las nueve y treinta de la mañana del 30 de enero de 1997, la policía de Richmond, Virginia, respondió a un reporte de disparos en un banco local.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: En cualquier momento, en cualquier lugar, las personas desaparecen, secuestradas durante sus rutinas diarias. Los depredadores siempre dejan pistas, pero perseguirlos lleva tiempo y eso dificulta los intentos de resolver estos secuestros fatales.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: El investigador forense revela la mirada más profunda hasta la fecha de la ciencia de la muerte.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: En California del Norte, se produce un incendio en medio de la noche. El cuerpo de una mujer es descubierto después de la combustión. Pero cómo apareció muerta sigue siendo un misterio.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: En Columbus, Ohio, una mujer es encontrada con un disparo en la cabeza. La muerte se considera un suicidio, pero algo no parece correcto y los detectives se niegan a dejar de investigar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En los años setenta, el Otpor, un ala violenta de la Resistencia Nacional Croata, cometió actos terroristas en contra de los que no apoyaban el movimiento en los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Filadelfia, una lucha despiadada para hacerse con el poder condujo a una guerra de la mafia a gran escala. La familia del crimen de la mafia local se dividió en dos mientras los jóvenes y los mayores se enfrentaban a muerte.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1980, unos extorsionistas colocaron una bomba de casi media tonelada en un casino de Nevada y exigieron un pago de millones de dólares, bajo la amenaza de detonar el dispositivo en caso de no recibir el dinero.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el suroeste, un ladrón en serie de bancos afirmaba que su botín era para los pobres, pero este ladrón no era ningún héroe popular, pues tenía un arma y estaba dispuesto a disparar.

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.desc: Caroline and Charles are devastated when they find out that Mary's sight is deteriorating and cannot bear to tell her the truth.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura's innocent joke about a fat man has near-tragic results when he turns out to be her best friend's father.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles and Jonathan become increasingly unhappy with Winoka; guest Ray Bolger.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Shocked at Walnut Grove's condition, the returning Ingalls, Garveys and Olesons try to convince the founder (Karl Swenson) it can be saved.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura begins to feel jealous when her father spends a lot of time helping Albert raise a new calf, causing Albert to run away.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mrs. Oleson writes a newspaper gossip column that manages to anger and slander nearly everyone in town.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Maggie and the Ferocious Beast
programme.desc: Our trio is off to find a treasure. / We get to see eveyones moring routines. / Hamilton lends his sweater to Nedley.

programme.title: Maggie and the Ferocious Beast
programme.desc: Maggie is cutting hair and buffing nails. / Hamilton gets carried away by some balloons. / Out trio becomes crime slovers.

programme.title: Maggie and the Ferocious Beast
