programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Kami, one of Barney's youngest friends, has trouble keeping up with the other kids and she's tired of always being last. She's not having a very good day.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Human Rights Concerts: The Struggle Continues

programme.title: The Doors

programme.desc: Get to know the savannah's master of camouflage and a shade-making squirrel.

programme.title: Into the Blue: The Wonders of the Coral Triangle
programme.desc: The northern part of Sulawesi Island has two different marine ecosystems: Lembeh, with its volcanic environment, and Manado, full of colourful soft coral; one of the reef's rarest species, the electric clam, has been filmed there.

programme.title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories

programme.title: Alien Abyss

programme.title: Shadowlands

programme.desc: Yasmila y Asaf están en el ojo del huracán. Valeria aprovecha los estragos y se lleva a Aldo. Asaf y Lilian terminan de nuevo. Los sentimientos de Queen hacen que Ana explote y los de Diana hacen que Chava dude. El nuevo Ex llega interrumpiendo.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Llegan nuevos y peligrosos EX. Queen necesita una armadura para tanto golpe al corazon y Fano lucha por mantenerla cerca, mientras que Ana prefiere a Nina. Alex y Kevin se dan latigazos de desprecio en una fiesta en cueros.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: No soportas, ¿verdad?

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Ya hace un año que Jessica conoció al hombre de sus sueños por mensajes. Sin embargo no ha conocido a Emilio en persona, ni ha aceptado hacer video llamadas y eso la lleva a desconfiar de su identidad.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace ya dos años que Freddy mantiene una relación en línea, se contactaron por las redes sociales y a medida que se fueron conociendo, comenzó a florecer una relación de amor en línea.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Ocho solteros llegan a una villa en Tulum dispuestos a conocerse y ligar en unas vacaciones únicas. Hay una fiesta de blanco y luego pasean en cuatrimotos hasta un cenote. Llega el primer ex y una pareja conoce la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el segundo ex a la villa y de inmediato causa polémica. En la fiesta dorada, Montse se divierte con Alejandro. Norma y Sargento coquetean en la piscina, mientras que Alejandro se va de cita y trata de ligar con sus famosos masajes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex en la villa, que no le cae muy bien a todos, pero parece que habrá una reconciliación. Norma está celosa por Sargento y Renata. En la fiesta de togas, Montse y Ernesto coquetean. Sargento se altera y casi llega a los golpes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex dispuesto a buscar venganza. La pool party se descontrola y surge el amor entre Renata y Sargento, lo que pone muy celosa a Norma. Montse y Spencer recuerdan los viejos tiempos y Brenda tiene un plan para vengarse.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: La Sala Tornado llama a votaciones. Algunos se van de fiesta a una casa flotante. La salida de Daphne se convierte en el pretexto para hacer explotar una bomba de tiempo que provoca una gran pelea.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Una dinámica los obliga a decirse las cosas de frente. Michelle y Kelly arreglan sus diferencias en la Sala Tornado. Salen por grupos a disfrutar de Colombia. Festejan el cumpleaños de Diana.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegaron a su fin y las relaciones comienzan un nuevo ciclo en un barco a Cartagena. David y Camilo aclaran los malentendidos. Hacen un último brindis todos juntos.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: ¡Celos, arena y mar!
programme.desc: Los influencers más top llegan a Cartagena. Leslie e Isaac se encuentran por primera vez después de conocerse por las redes sociales. Una riña entre Lizbeth y Ana comienza a dividir a los bandos en la villa. El primer ex hace temblar a algunos.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock suspects foul play when a college basketball coach is accused of pay-offs, point-shaving, and murder. As tempers flare and accusations run wild, Matlock makes an enlightening discovery, the head of the booster club was bribing recruits

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: The attraction is fatal! Matlock defends an obsessive suitor framed for allegedly murdering the love of his life, a dating service candidate so repelled by his presence that she had a restraining order to keep him away.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Joining forces with an old friend and adversary, Julie March, Matlock attempts to reverse a murder sentence and unravel a case of corruption, conspiracy, and perjury.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: One of Ben’s old clients is charged with bank robbery, again. The only witness is a precocious twelve-year-old boy who presents more than a handful of problems for Matlock. One of them is the boy’s fee for helping out. He wants Matlock to defend his dad.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Katie Clark, the new assistant D.A. in town, is trying to juggle the demands of being a single parent and perform a stellar job on her first prosecution case. But, to her horror, she learns that the suspect she’s trying to convict is her former lover.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A surgical mishap and a malpractice suit aren’t the end of Dr. Bradley Gray’s troubles. He’s been murdered! Jerri Stone’s little sister, Nurse Rachel, is the number one suspect.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: An afternoon fishing expedition evolves into a nightmare. Matlock watches in horror as the boat he just disembarked suddenly explodes into a fireball killing his companion, Judge Stern.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A craving for a down-home barbecue in the inner city leads Matlock into a dangerous situation. After his car breaks down, he’s mugged at knifepoint. Even his barbecue dinner is stolen! However; one good samaritan, Stan Johnson, comes to his aid.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Cliff's old college chum, Craig Browning, is defending Cameron Ivers for drunkenly crashing a party hosted by reputed scam artists John Robinson and Mitchell Reeves.

programme.desc: Fredrik has a strategy for his new Nolita building, designed by Lenny Kravitz and his team, and he's going to need his passport; Ryan befriends a quirky apartment owner, only to find the rug being pulled out from under him.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: In Paris, Fredrik's launch goes according to plan until another broker tries to stake his claim with the developer; Ryan contemplates a risky new career move; Luis makes an emotional revelation concerning his life in Paris.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik takes on a penthouse listing where the owners have overspent; Steve hustles to sell his ex-girlfriend's apartment and her next-door neighbor's unit in record time; Ryan has to sell out a Brooklyn building for a first-time developer.

programme.desc: Fredrik takes on 50 Cent's Connecticut estate listing and throws an epic broker's open to entice buyers; Ryan has a chance at the biggest listing of his career but only if he can get to Shanghai in time; Steve takes on a stale penthouse listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan hits a speed bump in his attempt to get to Shanghai with $1 billion in business on the line; Fredrik's tensions with his co-lister put a potential deal in jeopardy; Steve gets a chance to work for a dream client.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: When a deal falls through, Steve's solution for getting the unit sold may end up draining his bank account; Fredrik launches a NoHo development with a creative but risky marketing campaign; Ryan mentors a young broker on a townhouse listing.

programme.desc: Ryan's caught in a tricky situation when selling a team member's Tribeca home; Steve gets his first shot at selling an entire building; Fredrik tries to sell an overpriced penthouse while mentoring a co-lister who wants a spot on his team.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik lists an infamous Chelsea townhouse with a seller whose reputation for firing brokers precedes her; Ryan entrusts a Park Slope listing to a brand new agent with unorthodox methods; Steve tries a change in strategy with the Circa building.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan searches for the perfect townhouse for a bickering couple; Steve is under pressure to choose a new brokerage; Steve and Fredrik travel to St. Lucia to pitch buyers on ocean-side villas; Steve is forced to make a career-changing decision.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan tries to win back a billion dollar development by throwing an event; Steve is anxious to prove himself as he battles the elements to sell a penthouse; Fredrik takes on a stunning new building and is pressured to make a major celebrity sale.

programme.desc: Steve tries to find a buyer for a charming country home on a piece of land in Upstate New York; Ryan has two weeks to work his magic on a skyscraper; Fredrik tries to impress his clients by selling an apartment to actor Bruce Willis.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: William Windom guest stars as Paul Mitchell, a boxing promoter tied to a crime syndicate who becomes a target of the IMF when one of his fighters is killed before he can talk to the police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon poses as a 50-year-old blind princess, heiress to a Balkan kingdom.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is assigned to knock out a boxing syndicate which fixes fights to create favorable odds for a bookmaking operation, in the first half of a two-part story.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Barney poses as a fighter making his comeback, who boxes his way to a title bout with Staczek (Robert Phillips) in the second half of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force, led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) enters Equatorial Africa to crush an army of mercenaries, led by a self-styled colonel, and to return plundered gold to its rightful owners.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Not knowing when, where, or how a dangerous adversary will strike, Jim Phelps and Cinnamon use themselves as human quarries.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An army commander (played by guest star Theodore Bikel) plots to become dictator by imprisoning an influential cardinal and using a look-alike actor for a public endorsement.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force offers a "fountain of youth" to the vain and dictatorial widow (guest star Ruth Roman) of the late president of a small South American country in order to depose her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest star Fernando Lamas portrays a diplomat-playboy who romances another diplomat's wife, played by Lee Grant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: With Phelps and Rollin as the leading men, the Impossible Missions Force stages an anti-American play which could prove to be a strong propaganda device for the enemy.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits an applesauce factory. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, X is waiting for his seeds to arrive. He plants the seeds, but they don't grow. He plays hide-and-seek while waiting. Mister Rogers talks about waiting.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers makes granola bags and talks about people without enough to eat. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Queen Sara discusses her Food for the World hunger project. Old Goat eats the plants. Mister Rogers talks about sharing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about how some foods are better than others. Chef Brockett makes a tasty snack. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday discovers Old Goat eating from his garden. The King plants seeds everywhere.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a picture book of vegetables and tours a vegetable soup factory. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, seeds are growing to send food to Northwood. Daniel thinks he has a tree that grows cans of vegetable soup.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers tells viewers that there are many different kinds of food. Food for the eyes, for the ears, and for the spirit.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a portrait of his father and has his portrait painted. He says no two people are exactly alike. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday gets an "exactly-like-me" portrait. It is a mirror.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers that his parents sometimes had to say "no" to keep him safe. Then, King Friday says "yes" to officiating a wedding.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Germaine Vaughan shows Mister Rogers how to break dance. Chrissie Thompson, who is handicapped, visits. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Ana Platypus wants to be in the wedding but can't. Daniel is having trouble being the ring bearer.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows photographs of weddings. He goes to Brockett's Bakery to make arroz con leche. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, everyone is preparing for a wedding. Daniel is nervous about his role as ring bearer and his costume.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a pottery studio to see how Eva Kwong makes a bowl. Later, Mister Rogers talks about weddings. Betty Okonak Templeton Jones marries James Michael Jones in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: While planting a seed, Mister Rogers talks about how long it takes for plants to grow and that learning to wait is important. He also shows a video about how people make orange juice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of a bird family, and an origami artist demonstrates how to make paper birds and puppets. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, a puppet couple, Betty and James, adopt a baby daughter.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits pediatrician Dr. Jane Breck, who shows young viewers what might happen during a child's routine checkup. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Cousin Mary Owl plans a cousin reunion!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about how children are curious about families that are formed by adoption and talks about his family's adoption of his own sister. He shows a film about different families in his Neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Sea World to see the families of penguins there. He talks about how every person in the world is different from everybody else. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, the cousin reunion takes place.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers builds several things on the sand table and talks about different ways to play. He shows a video of some of the many ways children like to play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At Chef Brockett's bakery, Eva Kwong's grandmother makes special Chinese dumplings, and Mister Rogers talks about how children can learn about so many things from adults.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how people make wooden rocking horses. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Mr. Aber gets a mask that makes him look like King Friday, and the Neighbors talk about the importance of making and keeping friends.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows viewers a kitten named Jimmy and a film of Jimmy's birth, and assures viewers that "it's all right to wonder about things." Then, poet and essayist May Sarton visits.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers invites viewers along on a visit to a special new playground designed and built by both adults and children. He makes up a song at the piano.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces his television Neighbors to gymnast Chaney Umphrey when he visits at his gym and watches as he exercises. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, mischievous Lady Elaine Fairchilde reveals a mystery!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy factory where people make plastic molded tricycles, and he receives a visit from folk singer Ella Jenkins who collects toy tops from around the world.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers flies a balsa wood airplane, and Mr. McFeely visits an airport control tower. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Prince Tuesday discovers that learning to ride a bike isn't always easy!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how empty containers plus some imagination can create a whole Neighborhood. In Make-Believe, Ana Platypus is jealous of Prince Tuesday's new bike and angry because her parents aren't buying one for her.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Half a mile below earth's surface, miners extract rough diamonds, pure carbon substances that become precious gems when cut and polished; explore diamond mining history and technology from 4th century BC to modern South Africa.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Around the world and across the eons, gold stands as a symbol of power, wealth, and love; the story of the hunters of the precious metal and their methods for extracting it.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: How the Comstock Lode, discovered near Virginia City, proved to be a scientific laboratory from which vast improvements in mining technology and safety were pioneered, including innovations in drilling, ventilation, drainage, and ore processing.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Dynamite explodes hills, drills divide stone walls, and giant cranes pull 400,000-pound blocks from quarry pits; rock serves as civilization's raw material for roads, buildings, paint, glue, makeup, antacids, and chewing gum.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Unleashing the energy behind rocks; exploring how they rock the world from the ground up; marble is mined miles underground; precious moon stones lighter than water.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: For over a century, the U.S. steel industry is a powerful symbol of the nation's industrial might; steel transforms a country of farmers and merchants into a nation of builders, then U.S. domination of the market meets new challenges in the 1970s.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Spinning your wheels isn't just going around in circles, in fact, it's revolutionary - literally; the history of civilization has turned on the wheel and we have traveled as far as we have because of it.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Well over two million years before modern man evolved, his primitive ancestors were making tools; the ability to extend the hand and strengthen the arm is considered one of the keys to human evolution.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The history of civilization could easily be measured in terms of our ability to make, use, and improve tools; episode examines power tool industry, which is booming thanks to more powerful, lighter, and quieter cordless tools.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Sink your teeth into the razor sharp world of saws; cut across the centuries to discover how the Egyptians arduously sawed stone as compared to modern saws that slice through limestone like butter.

programme.title: Modern Marvels Essentials

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cosmo y Wanda están cansados de cuidar al bebé y Timmy se ofrece de canguro para que ellos salgan en una cita romántica/Timmy desea cabello con personalidad arrolladora y que nunca se pueda cortar.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Para Timmy Turner, nada es peor que el dolor de garganta, hasta que llega al hospital. Ahora deberá sacarse las amígdalas, y tal vez algo más. / La manía de piratas se ha instalado en la ciudad de Dimmsdale.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Timmy desea ser como CC Cruiser, su actor favorito de televisión. Todo lo que necesita son Wanda, Cosmo y un pequeño Cosmoto / Timmy se siente abandonado por Wanda y Cosmo, entonces se le ocurre pedirles una varita mágica

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Crocker quiere hacerse cargo de los poderes de los padrinos mágicos. Pero su plan se sale fuera de control cuando entra a la estación de transformación que deseó Timmy. / Timmy desea que la tecnología desaparezca del mundo.

programme.title: Los padrinos mágicos
programme.desc: Cuando Timmy no obtiene lo que quiere en Navidad, simplemente lo desea. Pero sus amigos no pueden hacer lo mismo, entonces Timmy desea que cada niño obtenga un cupón mágico que les permita un deseo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja construye un puesto para hacer burbujas. / Bob Esponja rompe sus pantalones y aprovecha para ser gracioso.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo hace que Bob Esponja y Patricio ya no sean amigos y trata de unirlos. / Bob Esponja hace una prueba de conducción con ayuda de Patricio.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Calamardo tratan de entregar una pizza a un cliente del Crustáceo Cascarudo. / Bob Esponja busca una casa nueva después de que los nematodos se comieran su casa.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio visitan a sus héroes Sirenoman y Chico Percebe a un asilo. / Bob Esponja olvida la fórmula de las Cangreburguers después de que olvido los pepinillos de la Cangreburguer de un cliente.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja es vigilante del aula y vigila la ciudad erróneamente ocasionando caos en la ciudad del Fondo de Bikini. / Bob Esponja se lleva una medusa a su casa.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Arenita tratan de ir a la luna en el cohete que Arenita construyó. / Don Cangrejo compra unas botas para Perlita pero se las da a Bob Esponja cuando Perlita no las aceptó.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se va a vivir con las medusa, deja de lado el Crustáceo Cascarudo y su casa de piña. / Calamardo inventa el día opuesto para mudarse.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo monta un show de talentos en el Crustáceo Cascarudo. / Bob Esponja le enseña a Plankton qué es la diversión.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja compra músculos inflables para verse mejor. / Bob y Patricio derriten una estatua de cera de Calamardo y creen que lo mataron, Calamardo sale del baño y les hace creer que es su fantasma.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja va con Perlita a un baile de su escuela. / Bob Esponja y Calamardo pelean para ver quién es el empleado del mes del Crustáceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo viaja sin querer en una máquina del tiempo. / Bob Esponja y Arenita pelean karate en todos los lugares y Bob debe evitar pelear en el Crustaceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After hitching a ride on a speedy shrimp, the Straw Hats reach the land of Skypiea! The intrepid pirates have much to learn about their new surroundings, but a beautiful angel makes a perfect tour guide.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami’s eagerness to explore the forbidden realm of Upper Yard brings her face to face with the wrath of god, and the Straw Hats incur Heaven’s Judgment for failing to pay their immigration fees!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are no strangers to living on the wrong side of the law, but unpaid immigration fees and Nami’s assault of a White Beret earns Luffy’s crew a sentence of death by cloud drifting!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Zoro, Chopper, and Robin are trapped aboard the Going Merry when it’s commandeered by a monstrous lobster! To rescue his crew, Luffy must venture onto the sacred grounds of Upper Yard!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Conis helps Luffy and his mates launch their rescue mission, but the rubber-man senses something amiss. When he presses her for answers, a vengeful god takes a shot at the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro dukes it out with a hungry Skyshark in the shadow of the Sacrificial Alter. On the other side of Upper Yard, Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp try to survive their visit to an island that wants them dead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp tangle with Satori and his exploding, snake-filled Surprise Clouds. The sky priest may look like a dancing dango, but the impact of his mantra leaves the pirates bloodied and boatless.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp and Sanji try to regain control of the Crow, and Luffy stirs up a brutal barrage of bursting balls when he attacks Satori. Meanwhile, Chopper whistles for the Sky Knight to avoid becoming a sacrificial reindeer!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper fights bravely to stop Shura from incinerating the Going Merry, but the little reindeer is no match for a sky priest. Gan Fall is on his way, but will the dispossessed deity arrive in time?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Gan Fall is badly burned during his battle with Shura, Chopper musters the courage for a death-defying leap of faith. Elsewhere, Luffy may have finally discovered a way to defeat Satori!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Shandorians prepare for an all-out attack on their priestly adversaries, Chopper meets the mysterious creatures that saved his life, and Nami makes an astonishing discovery about the origins of Upper Yard.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Shandorians continue their battle for control of Upper Yard, the Straw Hats celebrate their happy reunion by swapping stories over a campfire and feasting on barbequed Skyshark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Laki’s pursuit of precious Vearth causes one of her Shandorian comrades to be injured during the battle with Ohm. As night falls on Upper Yard, the Straw Hats dream of gold while dancing with wolves!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The electrifying deity of Skypiea, God Eneru, grants his priests unlimited power in their hunt for the Straw Hats. Usopp has a plan to get the mysteriously-repaired Going Merry back in the water, but it involves using Chopper as bait!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats scatter when their search for gold uncovers a giant python, and Gan Fall reveals the tragic story of Jaya’s arrival in the sky. Meanwhile, Wyper readies the Shandorians for a raid on Eneru’s shrine!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the heartless god of Upper Yard eagerly anticipates the dawning of Sky Warefare, the Shandorian forces are savagely snared by the Ordeal of String, and Luffy wanders into the fight of his life!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro rushes to perfect a deadly technique known as the Flying Blade Attack. The move proves difficult to master, but it could be the key to the swordsman surviving a battle with the Shandorian warrior, Braham.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Usopp are driven to their knees by the electrifying presence of god, Luffy is nearly incinerated by Wyper’s Burn Bazooka, and Nami joins Gan Fall in a fight against two killer clones!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper unleashes the fury of his Rumble Ball during a sticky slugfest with a swap cloud spewing priest of Upper Yard. Can the little reindeer discover his opponent’s lone weakness before it’s too late?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the Knight of the Sky team up to obliterate two bumbling, balloon-shaped bad guys, and God Eneru relies on his astounding invincibility to torment a noble Shandorian warrior.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin’s search for a mystical city of gold is interrupted by Yama, one of Eneru’s faithful servants. When the rampaging warrior destroys some ancient ruins, he provokes the wrath of Robin’s many fists of fury!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Priest Ohm silences Chopper with an attack from which few – if any – ever recover. Meanwhile, Luffy begins to notice something strange about his cave-like prison, and four fearsome warriors prepare for battle!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Gan Fall, Wyper, Ohm, and a prizefighting pooch gather for a ferocious free-for-all at the site of the Upper Ruins. While the battle rages, Luffy tries to punch his way out of the belly of a poisonous python!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Wyper are out to beat down the same bad guys, but will they realize it soon enough to survive a white-barbed death match of doom? Deep in the belly of the python, Nami and Luffy enjoy what could be a short-lived reunion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Eager to end their battle, Zoro aims the awesome destructive power of his 108 Caliber Phoenix at the sinister Priest Ohm! Elsewhere, god demands that Robin help him search for a legendary golden bell.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: God Eneru begins a deadly rampage aimed at exterminating the heavenly beings of Skypiea, and the ruins of Shandora become the scene of a bloody contest where survival is the name of the game.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Gan Fall, Wyper, Zoro, and Robin join forces for an attack on God Eneru. Despite their furious onslaught, the four warriors prove powerless to harm the thunderous deity until Wyper utilizes the power of a mystical stone!

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) go undercover in the Church of the Companions and learn that humanity is being used to produce sustenance for the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: When the deceased Taelon Ku'don (Michele Duquet) returns to haunt Zo'or (Anita La Selva), it is revealed that Zo'or is stealing profits from the Taelon co-ventures.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Jonathan Doors' (David Hemblen) fate hangs in the balance when his son Joshua (William de Vry) succumbs to a mind-controlling device.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) retrieves an ancient Taelon relic and discovers that humanity is the genetic link between the Taelons and Jaridians.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) find themselves in a life-and-death situation when they try to rescue the pregnant Lili (Lisa Howard), who has returned to Earth determined to give birth to her human/Jaridian hybrid baby.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: As the fourth season begins, Lili Marquette (Lisa Howard) gives birth to a child that may be the last hope for survival of the Jaridians.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) and Liam (Robert Leeshock) discover Da'an (Leni Parker) is addicted to Kryss, a substance used by Taelons to help them adapt to Earth's atmosphere.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) and Liam (Robert Leeshock) investigate the link between Zo'or (Anita La Selva) and a biomedical facility's clandestine cloning operation.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: While deceased Doors International President Jonathan Doors (David Hemblen) resurfaces in cyber form to deliver a potentially deadly blow to the Taelons, an alien murder aboard the mothership reveals to Liam (Robert Leeshock) the Taelon's darkest secret.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: An amoralist's plan to steal a fortune in gold from Zo'or (Anita La Selva) puts Augur's (Richard Chevolleau) life in jeopardy.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The discovery of a deadly parasite, believed to be extinct, threatens an amnesty for all Resistance members, which has been negotiated by the Atlantic National Alliance.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Chaos erupts when the Taelons decide to abandon Earth in the face of imminent Jaridian invasion.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee's (Jayne Heitmeyer) younger brother, Richard (Chris Martin), falls victim to Zo'or's (Anita La Selva) plot to harness human emotions.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: While onboard the Mothership, Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) is taken hostage by a mysterious being who haunts the secret chambers of the vessel.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The wife of a Marine, a pregnant dominatrix and a sex slave cross paths in a twisted tale of kidnapping, lies and murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mom does all she can to provide for her kids, including taking up with five sugar daddies to make ends meet, but when jealousy rears its ugly head, this mom winds up dead and her killer is not who you would expect.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: To keep their marriage fresh, a young couple turns to a life of sex games and sharing spouses, but when threesomes and foursomes lead to murder, investigators struggle to prove who killed this swinger.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When an athletic and popular college student is violently murdered in her apartment, police track down several surprising suspects, including one with a disturbing obsession, before crucial evidence unmasks a dangerous predator no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A fun-loving 59-year-old man is found shot to death in his home and his beloved jewelry collection has been stolen, leading detectives to a long list of suspects and a killer harboring a dark secret.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A restaurant is robbed and the night manager murdered, leading police to investigate suspicious co-workers, a disgruntled ex-employee and a violent serial attacker.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: Detectives investigate a secret affair, a kidnapping plot and a racist gang when a young husband-to-be is found shot and stabbed.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a devoted mother is stabbed to death in a horrifying attack, suspicion falls on those closest to her; a cryptic note and a violent crime spree baffle detectives at first, but they eventually track down a deranged killer no one predicted.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A vibrant young mother of three is murdered in the safety of her own home and investigators look to a history of troubled romances, but when the case goes cold and police can't find the killer, a phone call leads to a culprit hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: An assassination, a bitter custody dispute and a gunman's cryptic words send police scrambling on an interstate hunt to find the killer of a beloved father and husband.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When the strangling death of a young mother and bride-to-be baffles police, detectives probe a workplace grievance in search of a killer, before a cherished possession provides a link to the crime and cracks the case wide open.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A wealthy trader and father of four is gunned-down at home while his family is tied up in a closet; police dig into affairs, mob links and a missing co-worker, until a new lead and a taped phone call reveal a plot decades later.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a young mother is found dead in a field after a night out, police scour security video to retrace a suspect's steps; the discovery of a second crime scene leads to an arrest, before high-tech forensics reveal a truth no one expected.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A cat-loving and recently divorced young woman dipping her toes back in the dating game is beaten and strangled in a brutal and unusual way; investigators dive into the murky world of online dating to hunt a killer who could be ready to strike again.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: Detectives discover the badly beaten body of a single young woman left bizarrely staged on her bed; fear in the community grows amid a rash of nearby murders until police are handed a break when a fresh look at old evidence points to the killer.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A pretty secretary enlists Perry Mason's help when she finds herself framed in a blackmail plot and then accused of the death of her employer's wife.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason, helping a citizen's committee fight a proposed construction project, finds himself more deeply involved when bribery, political blackmail, and murder develop.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Vindictive Laura Randall is slain after she plots to blow up her husband's unique underwater technology.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Willard Nesbitt stages his own death so his wife can collect the insurance, but when he learns his business partner plans to cheat his wife out of royalties, he 'returns to life' before being killed.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: James Kincannon finds himself in need of Mason's services after being accused not only of jewel fencing but of pushing a man out of a penthouse window as well.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: When convicted embezzler Fred Swan returns to his hometown, it means trouble for Iris McKay, a former client of private investigator Paul Drake.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A road builder facing bankruptcy decides to have things out with the man responsible for his plight, only to wind up being charged with murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A baby gorilla is kidnapped and a murder victim is left in a lion's cage as evidence.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A museum employee who served his sentence after being falsely accused of setting fire to an art collection returns to settle accounts with the man who framed him.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank pick a house that's stacked to the ceiling with rare toys. Mike adds to his King Kong collection while Frank drops a bundle on a rare train set.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys pick the collection of a reclusive and mysterious businessman named "the Colonel," who has gone to great lengths to keep his identity a secret.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Since opening his second store, Mike's feeling serious pressure to fill up the van. He gets lucky while freestyling in Virginia with Danielle. A cold call with Gary pays off with a pink jukebox and the remains of a rare 1930s motorbike.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Danielle turns up a good lead she's been working on for months. When Mike tells Frank let's pack up for a trip to South Dakota, Frank says he can't.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank bet on who is the best picker. The loser gets to wash their filthy van. Working against the clock, the guys try to strike a deal in a savvy seller's jam-packed barn.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: After taking a joyride on a rare 100 year old monster tractor, Mike and his brother Robbie take to a property packed with amazing steam engines and rusty relics.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.desc: The Pawn Stars have an opportunity to buy something they've never bought before--a helicopter! Can Rick convince the Old Man to come along and spin up a deal?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with one of most unique items to ever hobble its way into the shop--a pirate's peg leg.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yukako Yamagishi Falls in Love, Part 2
programme.desc: Yukako’s dangerous obsession with reshaping Koichi into a man fit for her gets worse, prompting Koichi to hatch an escape plan. He tries to call Josuke for help using a nearby pay phone but is stopped by Yukako, who anticipated his move.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let’s Go Eat Some Italian Food
programme.desc: Josuke and Okuyasu come across an Italian restaurant owned by an Italian chef named Tonio. When Okuyasu asks for the menu, Tonio explains that he decides the menu on the spot based on the customer he sees.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Chili Pepper, Part 1
programme.desc: Chili Pepper suddenly appears before Josuke to test his Stand powers. Josuke puts up a fight but is overwhelmed by Chili Pepper’s power. The next day, Josuke and friends learn from Jotaro that a man who can locate Chili Pepper is heading to Morioh

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Chili Pepper, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends gather at the Port to try and reach Joseph Joestar before Chili Pepper. Speculating the enemy is hiding nearby, Jotaro orders Josuke and Koichi to stay behind and find Chili Pepper’s user while he and Okuyasu go protect Joseph.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: We Picked Up Something Crazy!
programme.desc: With Akira Otoishi arrested and the bow and arrow safely recovered, peace seemingly returns to Morioh. But Josuke’s life is far from peaceful as he struggles to deal with his father, whose old age is making things difficult for them to bond.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let's Go to the Manga Artist's House, Part 1
programme.desc: Koichi and Hazamada visit the home of Rohan Kishibe, a popular manga artist whom they are huge fans of. Much to their joy, Rohan not only agrees to sign autographs but also invites them to take a tour of his workspace.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let's Go to the Manga Artist's House, Part 2
programme.desc: Koichi is drawn back to Rohan’s house, where he sees the manga artist finishing up his next manga at an incredible speed. Rohan uses his stand Heaven’s Door on Koichi again to gain further creative inspiration from the young boy’s life experience.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Let's Go Hunting!
programme.desc: Jotaro and Josuke must hunt down a rat that is believed to have become a Stand user after being shot by the bow and arrow. When the two arrive at the site, they find dozens of dead rats killed in the most bizarre fashion.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Rohan Kishibe's Adventure
programme.desc: Koichi and Rohan discover a small alley that does not appear to be listed anywhere on the map. The two decide to go into the alley to see where it leads but soon find themselves walking around in circles and unable to get out.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shigechi's Harvest, Part 1
programme.desc: Josuke and Okuyasu become friends with a Stand user named Shigekiyo Yangu, a.k.a. Shigechi, who can use his Stand to find and collect the money that is scattered across town. Impressed by the boy’s abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shigechi's Harvest, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke and friends try to cash in the winning lottery ticket they found. However, the bank clerk is not convinced they’re the actual owners of the ticket, placing the three teens into a tough spot as they try to talk their way through their big lie.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yukako Yamagishi Dreams of Cinderella
programme.desc: Yukako, depressed because she can’t get Koichi to return her feelings, comes across a beauty salon where the owner claims a special beauty treatment will help customers find love and happiness…

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yoshikage Kira Just Wants to Live Quietly, Part 1
programme.desc: A man named Yoshikage Kira is enjoying his lunch break at the park with a sandwich in hand. But his peaceful afternoon is cut short when Shigechi accidentally takes Kira’s sandwich bag, believing it to be his own.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yoshikage Kira Just Wants to Live Quietly, Part 2
programme.desc: Yoshikage Kira is revealed to be the serial killer who’s been lurking in Morioh, and a Stand user as well. Having discovered his secret, Shigechi tries to fight off Kira with his Harvest, only to suffer fatal wounds from the killer’s Stand, Deadly Queen

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Attack, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and Koichi come under the attack of Yoshikage Kira’s Stand bomb, called Heart Attack. Narrowly escaping the blast, Koichi tries to go after the serial killer but is stopped by Jotaro, who tells him to focus on dealing with the Stand bomb first.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Attack, Part 2
programme.desc: Kira is forced to appear before Koichi after his remote Heart Attack bomb is made useless by the boy’s new Stand, Reverb Act 3. Finally coming face-to-face with the serial killer, Koichi attacks him with Act 3.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Father
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends are at Yoshikage Kira’s home trying to find any clues that may lead them to the serial killer, who has gone into hiding under a new face and identity.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Janken Boy Is Coming!
programme.desc: Kira’s father, Yoshihiro, begins searching for Stand users who would help protect his son from his pursuers. Meanwhile, Rohan is taking photos at the train station when he is suddenly challenged to a game of rock-paper-scissors.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: I'm an Alien
programme.desc: While on their way to school, Josuke and Okuyasu find a young man lying unconscious in the middle of what appears to be a crop circle. When they try to take a closer look, the man suddenly wakes up and starts claiming he’s an alien from outer space.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Highway Go Go, Part 1
programme.desc: Rohan is convinced that Josuke is cheating in their game of Cee-lo when all the dice rolls in his opponent’s favor. Feeling insulted, Rohan stabs his own finger and swear he’ll find out how Josuke is cheating in their next round.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Highway Go Go, Part 2
programme.desc: Rohan sacrifices himself to save Josuke from a remote-controlled Stand that sucks nutrients out of its victims. Moved by Rohan’s act of bravery, Josuke races through town to find and defeat the Stand’s user before it can kill Rohan.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Cats Love Yoshikage Kira
programme.desc: Shinobu tells her husband, Kosaku, that she saw a stray cat in their basement with a hole in its throat. When Kosaku goes down to take a look, he finds the cat already dead, The next morning, a strange plant sprouts from the spot where the cat was buried.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 1
programme.desc: Yoshihiro Kira spots Kosaku Kawajiri and instantly recognizes that it’s actually his son, Yoshikage. Meanwhile, Josuke, Okuyasu, and Mikitaka find a strange man living in an abandoned electrical tower.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke enters the electrical tower again to save Mikitaka and defeat Toyohiro Kanedaichi. Meanwhile, Rohan receives a visit from a first-class architect named Masazo Kinoto, who’s come to estimate the repair costs to his burnt house.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 3
programme.desc: Rohan finds himself possessed by Masazo Kinoto’s Stand, Cheap Trap, who tells the manga artist to burn the photos he took of the people in Morioh. Meanwhile, Josuke and Yuya encounter the Stand user responsible for Koichi’s disappearance.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 4
programme.desc: Rohan calls over Koichi to help him fight off Cheap Trap, which has attached itself onto Rohan’s back. Unfortunately, Koichi thinks Rohan is pulling a prank on him and leaves.

programme.title: City Hunter: Million Dollar Conspiracy
programme.desc: A new island resort has been built in Tokyo bay, and it is run by one of the world's most powerful supercomputers. The City Hunter gang has been invited to the grand opening party, but only Miki & Kaori have gotten there.

programme.title: City Hunter: Shinjuku Private Eyes
programme.desc: In this 2019 reboot of the iconic City Hunter saga, private detective Ryo Saeba is hired to be model Ai Shindo's bodyguard after she was viciously attacked.

programme.desc: Naruto's battle to reclaim his honor begins! Naruto is convicted of a serious crime he didn't commit and is sent to the inescapable prison, Hozuki Castle.

programme.desc: Justin and Mike fight through snow and frozen water to get to the one potentially high-value slab of jade-the Big Fin. In Jade City, Claudia cuts open a tourist's 700-year- old dinosaur egg.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Winter arrives at Dynasty and the crew struggles to mine up to the last possible minute. Claudia and Robin are worried Justin and Mike are pushing themselves too hard.

programme.title: Fisherman's Handbook

programme.title: Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: New baits and techniques are introduced to the fishing industry on a regular basis. In this episode of the Fisherman’s Handbook, we take a look at some of the latest products to hit the market that will help you catch more fish.

programme.title: Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Springtime bass fishing is one of the most dynamic times of the year for an angler. One of the most difficult things to do is locate exactly where the biting fish are located as the weather can keep fish always on the move.

programme.title: Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Do you have fishing goals in mind every time you launch the boat? We address all those topics in today’s show as we dissect ways to catch largemouth bass with insight from Clark Wendlandt and Wade Middleton on how they make a plan for a day of fishing.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: South China Sea conditions continue to assault the team. Checking the men and their Jet Ski out of Malaysia and into Thailand becomes a major problem.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: This week on Americana Outdoors, we’re taking a rare look at our favorite method of preparing delicious meals out of the wild game we’ve harvested out in the field using the Bradley Smoker!

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: This week on Americana outdoors, we’re gearing up for what’s promising to be a winter whirlwind of a hunting experience as we venture out on the lookout for Texas Blue Quail!

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una aparente víctima de un tiroteo le falta la nariz; una niña se deteriora ante los ojos de su familia por un caso grave de meningitis; un médico lucha por salvar a un paciente suicida.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los paramédicos se apresuran a la escena de un traumático accidente de carretera. El Dr. Eric Maniago ha tratado a muchos VIP, pero cuando una princesa se presenta en su sala de emergencias, se encuentra en un territorio desconocido.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El cráneo de un hombre es atravesado con una palanca; la tos de una mujer resulta ser una infección por gusanos internos; una novia está cosida en su vestido de novia y se niega a quitárselo, aunque necesita tratamiento para un cálculo renal.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre con una lesión en la mano se desmaya por un dolor abdominal, las pruebas conducen a un descubrimiento impactante; la hija separada de un paciente ayuda a resolver el misterio de sus síntomas mortales.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
